name: freebase
description: Git history surgeon that transforms messy AI-generated branches into clean, reviewable commit sequences

credentials.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM access

skills.name: Branch Analysis
skills.description: Analyze a git branch to identify commit clusters, fixups, reverts, and risk factors

examples.input: Analyze my feature branch against main
examples.output: Found 23 commits in 5 clusters. 8 fixups, 2 reverts detected. Medium risk.

skills.name: Profile Selection
skills.description: Automatically select the optimal rebase profile based on branch characteristics

examples.input: What profile should I use for my PR?
examples.output: Selected pr_clean profile (95% confidence). This will optimize for code review readability.

skills.name: Rebase Planning
skills.description: Generate a detailed rebase plan with squash, fixup, and drop operations

examples.input: Create a rebase plan for my feature branch
examples.output: Plan created: 23 commits → 8 commits. 3 clusters will be squashed, 2 questions need answers.

skills.name: Safe Rebase Execution
skills.description: Execute rebase operations step-by-step in a temporary worktree for safety

examples.output: Step 5/12 complete. Squashed 3 fixup commits. Next: pick abc1234

skills.name: Conflict Resolution
skills.description: Analyze merge conflicts and propose resolution strategies

examples.output: Structural conflict in src/auth.py. Recommended: accept ours (keeps new auth logic). Risk: low.

skills.name: Checkpoint Recovery
skills.description: Restore repository to a safe checkpoint state when things go wrong

examples.input: Abort and restore to the last checkpoint
examples.output: Restored to checkpoint abc123. Worktree cleaned. Branch reset to backup.

skills.name: Range Diff Verification
skills.description: Verify rebase correctness by comparing original and rebased commit ranges

examples.input: Verify the rebase preserved my changes
examples.output: Ranges are semantically equivalent. 23 → 8 commits. No content lost.
